title: mapania humilis
intro: Mapania humilis is a type of aquatic plant commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions of Asia and Australia, belonging to the family Cypaceae. It has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it a potential treatment for various health issues. The health benefits of Mapania humilis include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating skin conditions such as acne and eczema. Herbal preparations of Mapania humilis can be made by drying and crushing the leaves, then brewing them as a tea or infusing them in oil for topical application.
